title: io.sparkedsense.sensor.environmental
description: Numeric-scalar environmental telemetry (temperature, humidity, pH, air quality, etc.) expressed as a SenML record array per RFC 8428.

bn.description: Base name — prefixed to every record's name.

bt.description: Base time in seconds since epoch.

u.description: Unit from the IANA SenML Units registry (e.g., 'Cel', '%RH', 'hPa').

t.description: Time offset from bt in seconds; absolute if bt absent.
